name: Tin Roof Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Mix and pat into 10-inch-springform pan (bottom and up sides).
32 oz CREAM CHEESE (good quality), remove from Package, place into pyrex bowl and Microwave for 2 minutes on High.
5 JUMBO EGGS, remove from Microwave for 25 seconds.
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cheese until light. Add sugar and beat again.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating after each.
3. Add cream, cornstarch, vanilla and mix well. Stir in nuts (optional).
4. Pour into prepared pan. Drop sauce in spoonful at a time and swirl with a knife.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour or so with a pan of water at the bottom of the oven to keep the humidity high. Cake is done when edges are firm but middle is still somewhat soft.
6. Let the cake cool several hours or overnight.
7. Top with more fudge sauce and peanuts. Enjoy. This one is rich, so be prepared!
